
---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for SocialAI Pro
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'feature-request']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

**Feature Title:**
A clear and concise title for the new feature.

**Problem Statement:**
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve. What pain point are users experiencing?

**Proposed Solution:**
A clear and detailed description of what you want to happen. Include specific functionality and user flows.

## 📋 Detailed Requirements

**User Stories:**
- As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]
- As a [user type], I want to [action] so that [benefit]

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Specific requirement 1
- [ ] Specific requirement 2
- [ ] Specific requirement 3

**Functional Requirements:**
- What should the feature do?
- How should users interact with it?
- What are the input/output expectations?

**Non-Functional Requirements:**
- Performance expectations
- Security considerations
- Accessibility requirements
- Mobile responsiveness needs

## 🎨 User Experience

**User Interface Mockups:**
Attach wireframes, mockups, or sketches if available.

**User Flow:**
Describe the step-by-step user journey:
1. User navigates to...
2. User clicks/taps...
3. System responds with...
4. User sees/receives...

**Integration Points:**
- How does this feature integrate with existing functionality?
- What pages/components will be affected?
- Are there any breaking changes?

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

**Implementation Approach:**
- Frontend changes needed
- Backend API modifications
- Database schema changes
- External service integrations

**Dependencies:**
- What existing features does this depend on?
- Are there any third-party services required?
- What new dependencies might be needed?

**Technical Complexity:**
- [ ] Low - Simple UI changes or configuration
- [ ] Medium - New components or API endpoints
- [ ] High - Complex integrations or architectural changes

## 📊 Business Impact

**Target Users:**
- Who would use this feature?
- What percentage of users would benefit?
- Which user segments (free, paid, enterprise)?

**Business Value:**
- How does this align with business goals?
- Expected impact on user engagement
- Potential revenue implications
- Competitive advantages

**Success Metrics:**
- How will we measure the success of this feature?
- What KPIs should we track?
- What would indicate the feature is working well?

## 🌟 Alternatives Considered

**Alternative Solutions:**
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why this approach is preferred.

**Workarounds:**
Are there any current workarounds users can employ while waiting for this feature?

**Inspiration:**
Are there similar features in other applications that inspired this request? Include links or screenshots.

## 📅 Timeline & Priority

**Urgency Level:**
- [ ] Critical - Blocking major functionality
- [ ] High - Important for user satisfaction
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Future enhancement

**Proposed Timeline:**
- When would you ideally like to see this implemented?
- Are there any external deadlines or events that make this time-sensitive?

**Dependencies on Other Work:**
- Does this need to wait for other features or fixes?
- Are there prerequisites that must be completed first?

## 🎯 Definition of Done

**Feature Complete When:**
- [ ] Design approved and implemented
- [ ] Frontend functionality working as specified
- [ ] Backend API endpoints implemented and tested
- [ ] Database changes deployed
- [ ] Unit tests written and passing
- [ ] Integration tests covering user flows
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Feature flagged and ready for rollout
- [ ] QA testing completed
- [ ] Accessibility testing passed
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Security review completed

## 💬 Additional Context

**Related Issues:**
Link any related issues, bugs, or feature requests: #123

**Supporting Information:**
- User feedback or requests that led to this feature
- Research or data supporting the need
- Links to relevant documentation or examples

**Questions for Discussion:**
- Are there any specific technical approaches we should consider?
- How should this feature handle edge cases?
- What are the security implications?

## ✅ Submission Checklist

Before submitting, please ensure:
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have provided clear requirements and acceptance criteria
- [ ] I have considered the technical and business impact
- [ ] I have included any relevant mockups or user flows
- [ ] I have specified the priority and timeline expectations

---

**For Product/Engineering Review:**
- Priority Score: [ ] P0 | [ ] P1 | [ ] P2 | [ ] P3
- Estimated Effort: [ ] S | [ ] M | [ ] L | [ ] XL
- Product Area: [ ] Content | [ ] Analytics | [ ] Team | [ ] Billing | [ ] Core
- Engineering Owner: @username
- Product Owner: @username
